creator: marco@crowdsec.net
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #7)

Yes I am aware of the issue, and think we can improve for the next versions, for crowdsec and all the 5/6 go bouncers. There is also some string manipulation going on in an external module to correlate with hub versions... have to take x.y.z-rcN into account etc. But right now if I only change it in the makefile, it will show

$ crowdsec-firewall-bouncer --version
version: v0.0.29-freebsd-v0.0.29
BuildDate: ...
